what_it_does: Records metadata for a channel attachment that links an image asset in the design-assets channel.
observations: The file contains only YAML frontmatter and no body content.
It declares an attachment of type images with id att-d11365c2.
The target is an image:// URI pointing to design-assets/icons/image (61).
An ISO-8601 added timestamp is present.
standouts: The target image path contains a space and parentheses in the filename: 'image (61)'.
The file is purely a ledger/metadata record with no explanatory prose.
conventions: Uses YAML frontmatter for structured metadata.
Follows an id-prefix convention (att-*) for attachment records.
Uses a channel-memory ledger layout with channel, attachment_type, target, and added fields.
References the asset with a custom image:// URI scheme.
concerns: The target filename 'image (61)' is generic and contains unescaped spaces/parentheses, which may cause parsing or linking issues.
There is no checksum, MIME type, size, or author information to verify or audit the attachment.
No description of what the image depicts.
notes: A bare attachment ledger entry that points the design-assets channel to a generic icon image file.
questions: What does the image 'image (61)' actually depict?
Who added this attachment and why?
Does the referenced image://design-assets/icons/image (61) asset currently exist?
Is the space/parentheses in the target path intentional or an artifact?
purpose_vs_actual: The stated purpose as an attachment record matches its content: it registers an image attachment for a channel.
intention_signals: It appears to be registering a specific icon image as an attachment belonging to the design-assets channel so it can be located and referenced by the ledger.
contribution: Provides a typed, timestamped reference that associates a channel with a specific image asset location.
summary_for_embedding: A YAML-only channel attachment ledger file with id att-d11365c2 that records an images attachment targeting image://design-assets/icons/image (61) in the design-assets channel.
intention_for_embedding: To register and timestamp an image asset attachment for the design-assets channel.
